name: Applesauce Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
24 ounces Cream cheese (softened)
1 cup Sugar
2 tablespoons Flour
3 Eggs
1 cup Applesauce
1/2 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/4 teaspoon Nutmeg
Combine all crust ingredients. Divide in half, press half into the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan, save the remainder for topping. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour, beating until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add remaining ingredients, beat until well blended. Pour mixture into crust-lined pan, ensuring it's level. Sprinkle remaining crust on top. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until a knife inserted comes out clean. To minimize cracking, place a shallow pan of water on the rack below while cooking.
